title: Clinical genomics evidence visualizations
description: Declared, CAS-backed figures derived from recorded clinical evidence packets.

resolvers.title: Out-of-process figure rendering
resolvers.description: Render a declared figure from a DuckDB relation and capture it in CAS.

resources.title: Evidence status counts by traversal lane

params.inputSql: WITH packet AS (SELECT content::JSON AS document FROM read_text(getvariable('packet_path'))), evidence AS (SELECT json_extract_string(item.value, '$.lane') AS lane, json_extract_string(item.value, '$.evidence_status') AS evidence_status FROM packet, json_each(json_extract(document, '$.lanes.direct.rows')) AS item UNION ALL SELECT json_extract_string(item.value, '$.lane') AS lane, json_extract_string(item.value, '$.evidence_status') AS evidence_status FROM packet, json_each(json_extract(document, '$.lanes.inverted.rows')) AS item) SELECT lane, evidence_status, count(*)::INTEGER AS n FROM evidence GROUP BY lane, evidence_status ORDER BY evidence_status, lane

attrs.caption: Evidence status counts by direct and inverted traversal lane
